Class GuildPOJO

java.lang.Object
dev.chojo.aether.serialization.pojo.GuildPOJO
public final class GuildPOJO extends Object
POJO for Guild serialization.

  • Constructor Details

    • GuildPOJO

      public GuildPOJO(RolePOJO highestBotRole, String name, String id, String iconUrl, List<RolePOJO> roles, ChannelViewPOJO channels, List<ReactionPOJO> reactions)
      Parameters:
      highestBotRole - the highest bot role in the guild
      name - the name of the guild
      id - the id of the guild
      iconUrl - the url of the guild icon
      roles - the roles in the guild
      channels - the channels in the guild
      reactions - the reactions in the guild
